title: Azure SQL Database Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Azure SQL managed databases.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of 'Azure SQL Database'?
options: Providing a scalable and fully managed relational database platform in the cloud

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of using Azure SQL Database for your project's database management?
options: Benefit from its automated database backup and patching features to ensure your application's data remains safe
It makes your code build faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
